title: First Amendment
summary: Added Ninth Schedule to protect land reform laws from judicial review. Added Articles 15(4), 19(6), 31A, 31B, 31C.

title: Second Amendment
summary: Added Article 31D regarding anti-national activities. Validated laws under the first schedule.

title: Third Amendment
summary: Modified Article 19(1)(g) and added Article 19(6) to allow state monopoly on any business.

title: Fourth Amendment
summary: Strengthened right to property by allowing state to fix compensation for acquisition. Added Article 31A.

title: Fifth Amendment
summary: Empowered President to modify boundaries of states.

title: Seventh Amendment
summary: Reorganized states on linguistic basis. Created Union Territories. Abolished Part A, B, C, D states.

title: Eighth Amendment
summary: Extended reservation of seats for SC/ST and Anglo-Indians in Lok Sabha and state assemblies.

title: Ninth Amendment
summary: Ceded Berubari Union to Pakistan as per Indo-Pakistan Agreement.

title: Tenth Amendment
summary: Incorporated Dadra and Nagar Haveli as a Union Territory.

title: Eleventh Amendment
summary: Changed procedure for election of President and Vice-President.

title: Twelfth Amendment
summary: Incorporated Goa, Daman and Diu as a Union Territory.

title: Thirteenth Amendment
summary: Created Nagaland as a state with special provisions.

title: Fourteenth Amendment
summary: Incorporated Puducherry as a Union Territory. Extended jurisdiction of High Courts.

title: Fifteenth Amendment
summary: Extended retirement age of High Court judges to 62 years.

title: Sixteenth Amendment
summary: Added prohibition of activities against national integrity in Articles 19(2), 29(3), and added Article 311(2)(c).

title: Seventeenth Amendment
summary: Added Article 31A with provisions for land reforms. Added 44 more Acts to Ninth Schedule.

title: Twenty-fourth Amendment
summary: Affirmed Parliament's power to amend any part of the Constitution including Fundamental Rights.

title: Twenty-fifth Amendment
summary: Curtailed right to property. Added Article 31C.

title: Twenty-sixth Amendment
summary: Abolished privy purses and privileges of former rulers.

title: Twenty-ninth Amendment
summary: Added two Kerala Land Reform Acts to Ninth Schedule.

title: Thirtieth Amendment
summary: Changed Article 132(1) regarding appeal to Supreme Court.

title: Thirty-first Amendment
summary: Increased number of Lok Sabha seats from 525 to 545.

title: Thirty-second Amendment
summary: Added Article 371D for equal opportunities in public employment in Andhra Pradesh.

title: Thirty-fifth Amendment
summary: Included Sikkim in the First Schedule as an associate state.

title: Thirty-sixth Amendment
summary: Elevated Sikkim from associate state to full statehood.

title: Thirty-seventh Amendment
summary: Incorporated Arunachal Pradesh and Mizoram as Union Territories.

title: Thirty-eighth Amendment
summary: Empowered President to declare different types of emergency. Added Article 359(1A).

title: Thirty-ninth Amendment
summary: Barred courts from inquiring into election of President, VP, PM and Speaker.

title: Fortieth Amendment
summary: Empowered Parliament to specify limits of territorial waters, continental shelf, and exclusive economic zone.

title: Forty-first Amendment
summary: Exempted Governor, President, VP, PM from appearing before courts.

title: Forty-second Amendment (Mini Constitution)
summary: Most sweeping amendment. Added Socialist, Secular, Integrity to Preamble. Added Fundamental Duties (Art 51A). Curtailed judicial review. Added DPSPs.

title: Forty-third Amendment
summary: Restored judicial review curtailed by 42nd Amendment.

title: Forty-fourth Amendment
summary: Restored right to property. Struck down internal emergency provisions.

title: Forty-fifth Amendment
summary: Extended reservation of seats for SC/ST in Lok Sabha and state assemblies.

title: Forty-sixth Amendment
summary: Added Articles 269 and 270 for levy and collection of taxes.

title: Forty-ninth Amendment
summary: Added provisions for Tripura as a full state.

title: Fifty-second Amendment
summary: Anti-defection law. Added Tenth Schedule.

title: Fifty-third Amendment
summary: Incorporated Mizoram as a full state.

title: Fifty-fifth Amendment
summary: Incorporated Arunachal Pradesh as a full state.

title: Fifty-sixth Amendment
summary: Incorporated Goa as a full state and Daman and Diu as Union Territory.

title: Fifty-eighth Amendment
summary: Provided for authoritative text of Constitution in Hindi.

title: Fifty-ninth Amendment
summary: Added provision for President's rule in Punjab.

title: Sixty-first Amendment
summary: Lowered voting age from 21 to 18 years.

title: Sixty-second Amendment
summary: Extended reservation for SC/ST in Lok Sabha and state assemblies.

title: Sixty-third Amendment
summary: Repealed provisions of President's rule in Punjab.

title: Sixty-fourth Amendment
summary: Extended reservation for SC/ST in Lok Sabha.

title: Sixty-fifth Amendment
summary: Added National Commission for SCs and STs.

title: Sixty-sixth Amendment
summary: Added Maharashtra Land Revenue Code to Ninth Schedule.

title: Sixty-ninth Amendment
summary: Granted special status to Delhi as National Capital Territory.

title: Seventieth Amendment
summary: Extended right to vote to citizens in local bodies.

title: Seventy-first Amendment
summary: Included Konkani, Manipuri, Nepali in Eighth Schedule.

title: Seventy-second Amendment
summary: Added provisions for Panchayati Raj.

title: Seventy-third Amendment
summary: Constitutionalized Panchayati Raj system.

title: Seventy-fourth Amendment
summary: Constitutionalized Municipalities.

title: Seventy-fifth Amendment
summary: Added provisions for rent control and tenancy laws.

title: Seventy-seventh Amendment
summary: Added Article 16(4A) for reservation in promotion for SC/ST.

title: Seventy-eighth Amendment
summary: Added 28 Acts to Ninth Schedule.

title: Seventy-ninth Amendment
summary: Extended reservation for SC/ST in Lok Sabha.

title: Eightieth Amendment
summary: Implemented GST Council recommendations.

title: Eighty-first Amendment
summary: Carried forward unfilled backlog of reserved seats.

title: Eighty-second Amendment
summary: Added Article 15(4A) for reservation in promotion.

title: Eighty-third Amendment
summary: Added Article 243M for Panchayat extension to tribal areas.

title: Eighty-fourth Amendment
summary: Extended reservation for SC/ST in Lok Sabha.

title: Eighty-fifth Amendment
summary: Modified Article 16(4A) for reservation in promotion.

title: Eighty-sixth Amendment
summary: Added Article 21A for right to education.

title: Eighty-seventh Amendment
summary: Extended reservation for SC/ST in Lok Sabha.

title: Eighty-eighth Amendment
summary: Added Article 270 for tax devolution.

title: Eighty-ninth Amendment
summary: Constituted separate commissions for SCs and STs.

title: Ninetieth Amendment
summary: Modified provisions regarding Bodoland Territorial Council.

title: Ninety-first Amendment
summary: Strengthened anti-defection law.

title: Ninety-second Amendment
summary: Added Bodo, Dogri, Maithili, Santhali to Eighth Schedule.

title: Ninety-third Amendment
summary: Added Article 15(5) for reservation in private unaided institutions.

title: Ninety-fourth Amendment
summary: Extended reservation for SC/ST in Lok Sabha.

title: Ninety-fifth Amendment
summary: Extended reservation for SC/ST in Lok Sabha.

title: Ninety-sixth Amendment
summary: Included Sindhi as official language.

title: Ninety-seventh Amendment
summary: Constitutionalized cooperative societies.

title: Ninety-eighth Amendment
summary: Added Article 371J for Telangana.

title: Ninety-ninth Amendment
summary: Established National Judicial Appointments Commission (NJAC).

title: Hundredth Amendment
summary: Acquired territories from Bangladesh for exchange of enclaves.

title: Hundred and First Amendment
summary: Introduced Goods and Services Tax (GST).

title: Hundred and Second Amendment
summary: Constitutionalized National Commission for Backward Classes.

title: Hundred and Third Amendment
summary: Provided 10% reservation for Economically Weaker Sections (EWS).

title: Hundred and Fourth Amendment
summary: Extended reservation for SC/ST in Lok Sabha. Removed seat reservation for Anglo-Indians.

title: Hundred and Fifth Amendment
summary: Restored state governments' power to identify socially and educationally backward classes.

title: Hundred and Sixth Amendment
summary: Women's Reservation Bill — One-third reservation for women in Lok Sabha and state assemblies.
